method: text-only stat-line census after Wave 1-8 (see data_trust.md Wave 9)

lines.name: Modification
lines.description: Modification: +2,354 Critical Avoidance.

lines.name: Modification
lines.description: Modification: +5% Stamina Regeneration.

lines.name: Challenger's Accuracy
lines.description: When in combat with 3 or more enemies, your Accuracy is increased by 2,250 every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 1 or less enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 11,250 Accuracy.

lines.name: Menzoberranzan Executioner
lines.description: Killing a Drider House Captain grants you 6% Combat Advantage for 30 minutes. This effect expires if you leave Menzoberranzan.

lines.name: Overwhelming Parry
lines.description: When in combat with multiple enemies, gain 9,925 Awareness. This bonus is at full power when in combat with 7 or more enemies.

lines.name: Occult Defence
lines.description: You gain 9,925 Defence. And when in Thay you gain -1.2% Incoming Damage.

lines.name: Umbral Stride
lines.description: Every 3s in combat, you will gain a stack of Umbral Stride. Each stack grants the following bonuses: General: +0.25% Power. DPS: +0.15% Critical Severity. Healer: +0.1% Overall Outgoing Healing. Tank: +0.3% Awareness. Max 10 stacks.

lines.name: Healer's Influence (Greater)
lines.description: Healing an ally with an Encounter power also heals you for 80,000 and grants you and close Allies 3% Defense for 5s.

lines.name: Enduring Resilience (Greater)
lines.description: Gain up to 5% Control Resistance and -2.5% Incoming Damage based on your missing health. The max bonus is achieved at 25% or less health. Currently: 0% Control Resistance and -0% Incoming Damage.

lines.name: Healer's Influence (Greater)
lines.description: Healing an ally with an Encounter power also heals you for 80,000 and grants you and close Allies 3% Defense for 5s.

lines.name: Enduring Resilience (Greater)
lines.description: Gain up to 5% Control Resistance and -2.5% Incoming Damage based on your missing health. The max bonus is achieved at 25% or less health. Currently: 0% Control Resistance and -0% Incoming Damage.

lines.name: Healer's Influence (Lesser)
lines.description: Healing an ally with an Encounter also heals you for 80,000 and grants allies close to you 2.1% Defense for 5s.

lines.name: Enduring Resilience (Lesser)
lines.description: Gain up to 3.5% Control Resistance and -1.8% Incoming Damage based on your missing health. The max bonus is achieved at 25% or less health. Currently: 0% Control Resistance and -0% Incoming Damage.

lines.name: Divine Blessing (Lesser)
lines.description: Your current Hit Points increases your Forte, up to a max of 4%. Currently: 4% Forte

lines.name: Medic's Respite
lines.description: Healing an ally with an Encounter power also heals you for 80,000 and grants Allies within 25' 1.5% Awareness and Incoming Healing for 5s.

lines.name: Awakening Rush
lines.description: Gain 3,350 Awareness, and an additional 2.5% Recharge Speed in Wildspace.

lines.name: Medic's Respite
lines.description: Healing an ally with an Encounter power also heals you for 75,000 and grants Allies within 25' 1.5% Awareness for 5s.

lines.description: Gain up to -2% Incoming Damage based on your missing health. The max bonus is achieved at 25% or less health.

lines.description: Gain up to -3% Incoming Damage based on your missing health, while in Wildspace. Non-Wildspace max: -1.5% Incoming Damage. The max bonus is achieved at 25% or less health.

lines.name: This or That
lines.description: When in a party, gain 50,000 Maximum Hit Points. When in a party, gain 5500 Outgoing Healing and Forte.

lines.name: Healing Foci
lines.description: When casting a single target heal on a target, gain 2% Critical Strike (max stack 5) for 5 seconds. The target receives 2% Incoming Healing (max stack 5) for 3 seconds.

lines.name: Healing Foci
lines.description: When casting a single target heal on a target, gain 2% Critical Strike (max stack 5) for 3 seconds. The target receives 2% Incoming Healing (max stack 5) for 5 seconds.

lines.name: Spider's Bane
lines.description: Gain 5,000 Power and gain more role effectiveness when in the Temple of the Spider. DPS: +6% Base Damage Boost. Tank: -6% Incoming Damage. Healer: +6% Overall Outgoing Healing.

lines.name: Spider's Bane
lines.description: Gain 4,500 Power in the Underdark and gain more role effectiveness when in the Temple of the Spider. DPS: +5% Base Damage Boost. Tank: -5% Incoming Damage. Healer: +5% Overall Outgoing Healing.

lines.name: Berserker's Might
lines.description: For the first minute you are in combat, you will gain 200 Power every 5 seconds. If you stay in combat for longer than one minute, you will lose 250 Power every 5 seconds, to a total loss of 2600 Power.

lines.name: Superstition
lines.description: At the start of combat, you will be surrounded by a ring of lucky trinkets for 7 seconds. If you pick up all the trinkets before they disappear, you will gain 1500 Power and Defense for 15 seconds. (30 second cooldown)

lines.name: Berserker's Might
lines.description: For the first minute you are in combat, you will gain 400 Power every 5 seconds. If you stay in combat for longer than one minute, you will lose 450 Power every 5 seconds, to a total loss of 4200 Power.

lines.name: Equip Bonus
lines.description: +2000 Power if your Defense is higher than your Power. +2000 Defense if your Power is higher than your Defense.

lines.name: Chilling Flow (2/2)
lines.description: 2 of Set: While in The Biting Cold, your Movement Speed is increased by 12%. Every 3s in combat, you will gain a stack of Chilling Flow. Each stack grants: General: +0.4% Power, DPS: +0.6% Critical Severity, Healer: +0.5% Overall Outgoing Healing, Tank: +0.5% Awareness. Max 10 stacks.

lines.name: Healer's Influence (Greater)
lines.description: Healing an ally also heals you for 80,000 and grants you and close Allies 3% Defense for 3s.

lines.description: Your Divinity maximum increases by 15%. Gain 3.5% Critical Severity.
